hero.title: The AI-Native Workforce Infrastructure Platform for the GCC
hero.subtitle: Helping GCC employers source, verify, hire, deploy and manage trusted blue-collar workforce across the region — powered by AI, recruiter expertise and end-to-end workforce operations.
hero.imageAlt: Diverse group of GCC blue-collar and professional workers standing confidently against a night skyline

trustedBy.heading: Trusted by leading employers across the GCC
trustedBy.industries: Retail · Hospitality · Construction · Oil & Gas · Logistics · Facility Management · FMCG · Healthcare

challenge.heading: The Workforce Challenge
challenge.title: The GCC Doesn’t Have a Talent Shortage. It Has a Workforce Infrastructure Challenge.
challenge.body: Growing businesses need reliable workforce. Candidates need genuine opportunities. Existing recruitment stays fragmented, manual and slow — leading to delayed hiring, rising costs, and dropouts.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Jobzshala bridges this gap by combining AI, technology and human expertise to create trusted workforce connections across the GCC.
mission.cta: Full breakdown on About Us page

howItWorks.heading: How Jobzshala
howItWorks.footnote: Every stage is managed through one platform.

whyChooseUs.heading: Why GCC Employers Choose
whyChooseUs.quote: We don’t send thousands of resumes. We deliver verified, job-ready workforce

trustVerification.title: Trust & Verification
trustVerification.bodySuffix: before an employer ever sees the profile. Employers deserve verified workforce. Candidates deserve genuine opportunities.

workforceAvailability.heading: Immediate Workforce Available Across
workforceAvailability.cardBody: Access recruiter-verified candidates already inside UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait and Bahrain — reduce hiring turnaround time with workforce already in-region.

corridor.heading: India to GCC Workforce
corridor.title: Building Trusted Workforce Mobility
corridor.body: Jobzshala connects verified workforce from India with GCC employers through a structured, technology-enabled deployment process — from profile verification through visa support to post-deployment support.

abuDhabi.heading: Built for Abu Dhabi. Built for the GCC.
abuDhabi.body: Abu Dhabi is building one of the world’s most innovation-driven economies. Jobzshala strengthens one of its most important growth enablers: trusted workforce infrastructure. Our ambition: help businesses hire faster, improve workforce productivity, and enable seamless workforce mobility across the GCC.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.body: We’re not building another job portal. We’re not building another recruitment agency. We’re building the AI-Native Cross-Border Workforce Infrastructure Platform that lets governments, employers, recruiters and workforce ecosystems source, verify, deploy and manage trusted talent across borders. Every growing economy is powered by people. Jobzshala powers the future of workforce mobility across the GCC.

hire.title: Looking to Hire Workforce?
hire.body: Build your workforce faster with AI-powered hiring and verified talent.

findWork.title: Looking for GCC Opportunities?
findWork.body: Create your verified workforce profile and access genuine opportunities across the GCC.

footer.tagline: Powering the Workforce Behind the GCC Economy. AI-Native Workforce Infrastructure for the Future of GCC Hiring.
